general_hex_cap_screw.sentence: Typical uses include machinery repair, brackets, frames, equipment mounting, maintenance work, and general bolted assemblies.

a325_structural_bolt.sentence: Typical uses include structural steel connections, steel framing, heavy construction, and bolted steel assemblies where A325 structural fasteners are specified.

socket_head_cap_screw.sentence: Typical uses include machinery, dies, fixtures, equipment panels, precision assemblies, and tight-clearance areas where socket-drive installation is preferred.

button_head_cap_screw.sentence: Typical uses include guards, panels, brackets, equipment covers, and assemblies where a smooth, low-profile head is preferred.

flat_head_cap_screw.sentence: Typical uses include countersunk plates, flush mounting, machine assemblies, and applications where the screw head should sit even with the surface.

flange_bolt.sentence: Typical uses include equipment frames, brackets, automotive-style assemblies, and applications where a built-in flange helps spread load without a separate washer.

carriage_bolt.sentence: Typical uses include wood-to-wood, wood-to-metal, decks, gates, brackets, and assemblies where the rounded head provides a cleaner finished appearance.

materialSentences.steel / black oxide: The black oxide finish gives the fastener a dark appearance commonly used for shop, machinery, and indoor applications.
materialSentences.steel / zinc: The zinc finish provides general corrosion resistance for indoor and light-duty environments.
materialSentences.steel / galvanized: The galvanized finish provides heavier corrosion protection for outdoor or exposed applications.
materialSentences.steel / plain: The plain steel finish is commonly used where coating is not required or where the fastener will be finished after installation.
materialSentences.stainless steel: Stainless steel provides improved corrosion resistance for wet, exterior, food-service, or washdown-prone environments.
materialSentences.aluminum: Aluminum provides a lightweight, corrosion-resistant option for non-ferrous assemblies and weight-sensitive applications.
materialSentences.brass: Brass provides a corrosion-resistant, non-sparking option often used where appearance or non-ferrous material is preferred.

threadCoverageSentences.full: The fully threaded shank is useful when maximum thread engagement is needed along the bolt length.
threadCoverageSentences.partial: The partially threaded shank provides an unthreaded grip section for standard through-bolt assemblies.

originSentences.domestic: This item is marked as domestic for applications or purchasing requirements that call for domestic-origin fasteners.
